description_long: This is a compact popcorn machine kiosk with a boxy, rectangular form and a flat roof. The front panel features a large, colorful 'POP CORN' sign with cartoon popcorn graphics, making it visually appealing and easy to identify. The main body is constructed from metal and transparent glass or acrylic panels, allowing clear visibility of the interior popcorn kettle and mechanisms. The rear side has a control panel with buttons and switches, as well as double doors for access to the interior. The sides are mostly transparent, with metal framing and ventilation slots near the top. The overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or event spaces.
description: A boxy, metal-and-glass popcorn machine kiosk with a bright 'POP CORN' sign and visible interior kettle. Features include a control panel, double rear doors, and transparent side panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'POP CORN' sign, transparent panel, and interior kettle.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals transparent paneling and upper ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the control panel, double doors, and visible kettle mechanism.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with transparent paneling and ventilation slots.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with cartoon popcorn graphics and 'POP CORN' text, placed above the front panel.
attribute_window_presence: Three large rectangular windows: one at the front, one on each side.
attribute_door_configuration: Double hinged doors at the rear.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof made of metal, no overhangs or decorative elements.
